name: StableTravel Hotel Autocomplete
description: Autocomplete hotel names by keyword; returns matching hotels with their Amadeus hotelIds, city/country, and geocode. Cheap name-to-hotelId resolver.

quirks: BOTH keyword AND subType are REQUIRED. subType enum is HOTEL_LEISURE or HOTEL_GDS.
GOTCHA (observed): subType=HOTEL_LEISURE returned HTTP 500 'Amadeus API error: Unknown error' even for a valid keyword; subType=HOTEL_GDS succeeded. Prefer HOTEL_GDS.
Returns hotelIds[] per match (note: array) — use those with /api/hotels/search.
Cheapest hotel endpoint ($0.0054). Optional: countryCode, lang, max.
Upstream Amadeus errors surface as {success:false,error} with a non-2xx status — treat 5xx as retry-with-HOTEL_GDS or transient.
usage.guide: Autocomplete hotel names by keyword; returns matching hotels with their Amadeus hotelIds, city/country, and geocode. Cheap name-to-hotelId resolver. GET https://stabletravel.dev/api/hotels/autocomplete?keyword=PARIS&subType=HOTEL_GDS&max=5 Output: data[].{id,name,iataCode,subType,relevance,type:'location',hotelIds[],address.{cityName,countryCode},geoCode.{latitude,longitude}}

name: StableTravel Hotel List by City
description: List hotels in a city by IATA city code (Amadeus reference data). Returns hotelId values used to fetch offers. This is the discovery step; it does NOT return prices/offers.

quirks: cityCode is REQUIRED and must be a 3-letter IATA CITY code (PAR, LON, NYC) — not a hotel name or country.
Returns hotel directory entries only (no prices). Feed hotelId into /api/hotels/search to get bookable offers.
Optional filters: radius, radiusUnit(KM|MILE), chainCodes, amenities, ratings(1-5 csv), hotelScore(BEDBANK|DIRECTCHAIN|ALL), max(default 100).
402 pre-flight body is empty; pay and you get 200 JSON.
meta.count is the total catalog size (e.g. 1694 for PAR), not the number of rows returned.
usage.guide: List hotels in a city by IATA city code (Amadeus reference data). Returns hotelId values used to fetch offers. This is the discovery step; it does NOT return prices/offers. GET https://stabletravel.dev/api/hotels/list?cityCode=PAR&max=5 Output: data[].{hotelId,name,chainCode,iataCode,dupeId,geoCode.{latitude,longitude},address.{countryCode,postalCode,cityName,lines[]},lastUpdate}; meta.count

name: StableTravel Hotel List by Geocode
description: List hotels near a latitude/longitude (Amadeus by-geocode). Returns hotelId values plus distance from the point. Discovery step; no prices/offers.

quirks: latitude AND longitude are BOTH REQUIRED (numbers). This is the by-geocode variant, distinct from /api/hotels/list (by city code).
Each row adds distance.{value,unit} from the query point; data[] is distance-sorted.
Returns hotel directory only (no offers/prices) — use returned hotelId with /api/hotels/search for bookable offers.
Optional: radius, radiusUnit(KM|MILE), chainCodes, amenities, ratings, hotelScore, max(default 100). Empty data[] means no hotels near coords, not an error.
usage.guide: List hotels near a latitude/longitude (Amadeus by-geocode). Returns hotelId values plus distance from the point. Discovery step; no prices/offers. GET https://stabletravel.dev/api/hotels/list/by-geocode?latitude=48.8757&longitude=2.32553&radius=2&max=5 Output: data[].{hotelId,name,chainCode,geoCode.{latitude,longitude},distance.{value,unit},address.{countryCode,postalCode,cityName,lines[]}}; meta.count

name: StableTravel Hotel Offers Search
description: Search bookable hotel offers (prices, rooms, cancellation policy) for one or more Amadeus hotel IDs and a date range. Returns offer.id values needed for booking.

quirks: hotelIds is REQUIRED — COMMA-SEPARATED Amadeus hotelId codes (e.g. HLPAR266). Get these from /api/hotels/list or /api/hotels/list/by-geocode first.
checkInDate/checkOutDate must be FUTURE dates (YYYY-MM-DD); past/today dates yield no offers.
offers[].id is the offerId used by /api/hotels/offer and /api/hotels/book — capture it.
Prices come back in the hotel's native currency (e.g. EUR) unless currencyCode is passed (enum of ~33 codes incl USD,EUR,GBP).

Optional filters: adults(default 1), priceRange(e.g. 100-300), currencyCode, paymentPolicy(GUARANTEE|DEPOSIT|NONE), boardType(ROOM_ONLY|BREAKFAST|HALF_BOARD|FULL_BOARD|ALL_INCLUSIVE), includeClosed, bestRateOnly, lang.
available:false hotels are omitted/marked; not every hotelId returns offers for a given date.
usage.guide: Search bookable hotel offers (prices, rooms, cancellation policy) for one or more Amadeus hotel IDs and a date range. Returns offer.id values needed for booking. GET https://stabletravel.dev/api/hotels/search?hotelIds=HLPAR266,MDPARMER&adults=1&checkInDate=2026-08-15&checkOutDate=2026-08-16 Output: data[].{type:'hotel-offers',hotel.{hotelId,name,chainCode,cityCode,latitude,longitude},available,offers[].{id,checkInDate,checkOutDate,rateCode,room.{type,typeEstimated,description.text},price.{currency,base,total,taxes[]},policies.{cancellations[],deposit,refundable.cancellationRefund},self},self}

name: StableTravel Hotel Offers by Hotel
description: Search bookable offers for a SINGLE Amadeus hotel ID and date range. Same shape as hotels/search but scoped to one hotelId.

quirks: FIELD-NAME TRAP: this endpoint uses SINGULAR hotelId (one code), whereas /api/hotels/search uses PLURAL hotelIds (comma list). Don't mix them up.
hotelId is REQUIRED; checkInDate/checkOutDate must be future YYYY-MM-DD.
offers[].id is the offerId for /api/hotels/offer and /api/hotels/book.
Same optional filters as hotels/search (adults, currencyCode, priceRange, paymentPolicy, boardType, includeClosed, bestRateOnly, lang).
usage.guide: Search bookable offers for a SINGLE Amadeus hotel ID and date range. Same shape as hotels/search but scoped to one hotelId. GET https://stabletravel.dev/api/hotels/search/by-hotel?hotelId=HLPAR266&adults=1&checkInDate=2026-08-15&checkOutDate=2026-08-16 Output: data[].{hotel.{hotelId,name,chainCode,cityCode},available,offers[].{id,checkInDate,checkOutDate,room.{type,typeEstimated,description.text},price.{currency,base,total,taxes[]},policies.{cancellations[],deposit,refundable},self}}

name: StableTravel Hotel Offer Detail
description: Get full details for a single hotel offer by offerId (re-confirms price, room, deposit/cancellation policy, accepted credit cards). Use right before booking.

quirks: offerId is REQUIRED — the offers[].id value harvested from /api/hotels/search or /api/hotels/search/by-hotel.
Offer IDs are time-sensitive: a stale/expired offerId returns an Amadeus error. Fetch fresh offers shortly before calling.
Response data is a single object (not an array) wrapping one hotel + its offers[]; includes deposit.acceptedPayments.creditCardPolicies for booking input prep.
usage.guide: Get full details for a single hotel offer by offerId (re-confirms price, room, deposit/cancellation policy, accepted credit cards). Use right before booking. GET https://stabletravel.dev/api/hotels/offer?offerId=NINLXLXOQ3 Output: data.{type:'hotel-offers',hotel.{hotelId,name,chainCode,cityCode,amenities[]},available,offers[].{id,checkInDate,checkOutDate,room.{type,typeEstimated,description.text},price.{currency,base,total,taxes[]},policies.{cancellations[],deposit.acceptedPayments.{creditCards[],methods[],creditCardPolicies[]},refundable.cancellationRefund}}}; meta.lang

name: StableTravel Hotel Booking
description: Create a real hotel booking order against an offer (Amadeus hotel-order). OUTWARD/irreversible: provisions an actual reservation. Not auto-called.

quirks: Required top-level: data.type MUST be literal 'hotel-order'; data.guests[] (each needs tid number); data.travelAgent.contact.email required.
guests[].tid is a numeric guest index referenced by roomAssociations; do not confuse with a string id.
Real booking needs a fresh offerId (from /api/hotels/offer) tied to roomAssociations[].hotelOfferId, plus a real payment.paymentCard. Offer must still be live or Amadeus rejects.
Cheapest write endpoint ($0.00216) but the x402 fee is separate from the actual hotel charge taken by the property/Amadeus.

APPROVAL-GATED: this is an OUTWARD/irreversible action (real charge / order / shipment). Shape is from the provider OpenAPI/discovery and was NOT QA-executed (we do not place real bookings/purchases as tests). The needsApproval gate fires before any real execution.
usage.guide: Create a real hotel booking order against an offer (Amadeus hotel-order). OUTWARD/irreversible: provisions an actual reservation. Not auto-called. POST https://stabletravel.dev/api/hotels/book  body: {data:{type:'hotel-order',guests[],travelAgent,roomAssociations[],payment}} Output: data.{type:'hotel-order',id,hotelBookings[].{id,confirmationNumber,hotelOffer,hotelProviderInformation}}; warnings[]

name: StableTravel Activities Search
description: Search tours and activities near a geographic point (lat/lng + radius) via the Amadeus Tours & Activities backend. Returns bookable activities with name, description, geocode, price, pictures, and a booking link.

usage.outputShape: data[].id, data[].name, data[].shortDescription?, data[].description (HTML string), data[].geoCode.latitude, data[].geoCode.longitude, data[].price.amount, data[].price.currencyCode, data[].pictures[], data[].bookingLink, data[].minimumDuration, meta.count, meta.links.self
quirks: Required query params: latitude, longitude. Optional: radius (km, default 1), max (default 50). No request body (GET).
data[].id is the activityId you pass to /api/activities/details.
price.currencyCode is EUR (not USD) for European activities — do not assume USD.

data[].description is an HTML string (contains
/

tags); shortDescription is plain text but not always present.
meta.count can be large (e.g. 1300) while only up to `max` items are returned.
usage.guide: Search tours and activities near a geographic point (lat/lng + radius) via the Amadeus Tours & Activities backend. Returns bookable activities with name, description, geocode, price, pictures, and a booking link. GET https://stabletravel.dev/api/activities/search?latitude={lat}&longitude={lng}&radius={km}&max={n}  (no body; x402/MPP payment auto-handled) Output: data[].id, data[].name, data[].shortDescription?, data[].description (HTML string), data[].geoCode.latitude, data[].geoCode.longitude, data[].price.amount, data[].price.currencyCode, data[].pictures[], data[].bookingLink, data[].minimumDuration, meta.count, meta.links.self

name: StableTravel Transfers Search
description: Search available ground/airport transfer (private car/shuttle) offers between an airport (IATA code) and a drop-off address via Amadeus. Returns priced transfer offers with vehicle, service provider, and a bookable offer ID.

usage.callShape: POST https://stabletravel.dev/api/transfers/search with JSON body {startLocationCode, endAddressLine, endCityName, endCountryCode, endGeoCode, transferType, startDateTime, passengers}
quirks: DROP-OFF REQUIRES BOTH full address (endAddressLine + endCityName + endCountryCode) AND endGeoCode together. Address-only -> 200 with body {errors:[{code:34604,detail:'NEED GEOCODES OF THE ADDRESS'}]}. Geocode-only -> 200 with body {errors:[{code:32803,detail:'MISSING DROP OFF LOCATION INFORMATION'}]}.
endGeoCode format is 'lat,long' as a single string (e.g. '48.8584,2.2945').
startLocationCode must be a valid IATA airport code (e.g. CDG).
You pay ~$0.003 even when the call returns a validation error in the body (HTTP is still 200) — build the body correctly the first time.
Response is large (~280KB); data[] holds many offers. Read price from data[i].converted.monetaryAmount (currency in data[i].converted.currencyCode, e.g. EUR).
Each offer's serviceProvider.settings may include 'FLIGHT_NUMBER_REQUIRED' — that flightNumber is needed at /transfers/book time.
Offer IDs (data[].id) are the offerId you pass to /transfers/book.
usage.guide: Search available ground/airport transfer (private car/shuttle) offers between an airport (IATA code) and a drop-off address via Amadeus. Returns priced transfer offers with vehicle, service provider, and a bookable offer ID. POST https://stabletravel.dev/api/transfers/search with JSON body {startLocationCode, endAddressLine, endCityName, endCountryCode, endGeoCode, transferType, startDateTime, passengers} Output: data[].id, data[].type ('transfer-offer'), data[].transferType, data[].start.{dateTime,locationCode}, data[].end.{dateTime,address.{line,cityName,countryCode,latitude,longitude}}, data[].vehicle.{code,category,description,imageURL,seats[].count,baggages[]}, data[].converted.{monetaryAmount,currencyCode,base.monetaryAmount,totalFees.monetaryAmount}, data[].quotation.{monetaryAmount,currencyCode}, data[].serviceProvider.{code,name,termsUrl,logoUrl,settings[]}, data[].extraServices[].{code,itemId,description,quotation.monetaryAmount,isBookable}

name: StableTravel Transfers Book
description: Book a transfer order from a transfer offer returned by /transfers/search. Creates a real, billable transfer reservation (Amadeus). OUTWARD/irreversible — places an actual booking; do not call without explicit user approval.

usage.callShape: POST https://stabletravel.dev/api/transfers/book with JSON body {offerId, data:{passengers[], payment, flightNumber?, note?, extraServices?[], ...}}. offerId + data are required; data.passengers and data.payment are required.
usage.outputShape: data (booked transfer order object), warnings[] (per OpenAPI; full shape unverified — not paid because outward)
quirks: offerId comes from a prior /transfers/search response (data[].id).
data.passengers and data.payment are REQUIRED by the OpenAPI schema.
If the chosen offer's serviceProvider.settings includes 'FLIGHT_NUMBER_REQUIRED', you must supply data.flightNumber.
Schema source: OpenAPI at https://stabletravel.dev/openapi.json — exact payment sub-object fields not live-verified.

APPROVAL-GATED: this is an OUTWARD/irreversible action (real charge / order / shipment). Shape is from the provider OpenAPI/discovery and was NOT QA-executed (we do not place real bookings/purchases as tests). The needsApproval gate fires before any real execution.
usage.guide: Book a transfer order from a transfer offer returned by /transfers/search. Creates a real, billable transfer reservation (Amadeus). OUTWARD/irreversible — places an actual booking; do not call without explicit user approval. POST https://stabletravel.dev/api/transfers/book with JSON body {offerId, data:{passengers[], payment, flightNumber?, note?, extraServices?[], ...}}. offerId + data are required; data.passengers and data.payment are required. Output: data (booked transfer order object), warnings[] (per OpenAPI; full shape unverified — not paid because outward)

name: StableTravel Transfers Cancel
description: Cancel a previously booked transfer order by orderId + confirmation number (Amadeus). OUTWARD/irreversible state change on a real booking; do not call without explicit user approval.

usage.callShape: POST https://stabletravel.dev/api/transfers/cancel with JSON body {orderId, confirmNbr}. Both required.
usage.outputShape: data (cancellation result object; per OpenAPI — not live-verified because outward)
quirks: Both orderId AND confirmNbr are REQUIRED (note the abbreviated field name 'confirmNbr', not 'confirmationNumber').
orderId and confirmNbr come from a prior /transfers/book response.
Schema source: OpenAPI at https://stabletravel.dev/openapi.json.

APPROVAL-GATED: this is an OUTWARD/irreversible action (real charge / order / shipment). Shape is from the provider OpenAPI/discovery and was NOT QA-executed (we do not place real bookings/purchases as tests). The needsApproval gate fires before any real execution.
usage.guide: Cancel a previously booked transfer order by orderId + confirmation number (Amadeus). OUTWARD/irreversible state change on a real booking; do not call without explicit user approval. POST https://stabletravel.dev/api/transfers/cancel with JSON body {orderId, confirmNbr}. Both required. Output: data (cancellation result object; per OpenAPI — not live-verified because outward)
